summary: The diff implements most of the required changes: useStableActor and useStableActorQuery hooks are created, and the majority of GET query hooks across public and admin pages are refactored. However, REQ-1 specifies using useRef for stabilization, but the implementation uses useState + useEffect instead. Additionally, named selector functions are not defined as separate named functions in most hooks — the selectors are inline anonymous async functions. The useGetBothStoreDetails public alias mentioned in REQ-3 is not visibly exported. Some files referenced in REQ-3 (the homepage categories hooks for useGetAllCategories and useGetHomepageCategories) are not shown in the diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: Stabilize the actor reference using useRef so it only updates once when the raw actor first becomes available
missing_requirements.reason: The implementation in useStableActor.ts uses useState + useEffect instead of useRef as explicitly required. While functionally similar, the spec explicitly calls for useRef.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each hook defines a dedicated named selector function (e.g., selectAllCategories)
missing_requirements.reason: In all refactored hooks, the selector functions are defined inline as anonymous async arrow functions rather than as dedicated named selector functions as required by the spec.

missing_requirements.requirement: useGetBothStoreDetails export must be present in frontend/src/hooks/useBothStoreDetails.ts
missing_requirements.reason: REQ-3 specifically lists useGetBothStoreDetails / useBothStoreDetails as affected hooks. The diff only shows useBothStoreDetails exported; no useGetBothStoreDetails export is visible.

missing_requirements.requirement: Each GET query hook in admin hook files defines dedicated named selector functions
missing_requirements.reason: All selectors in admin hook files are inline anonymous functions rather than named selector functions as required.

hallucinated_features.description: useStableActorQuery returns a modified isFetched field (!!stableActor && query.isFetched) in addition to the enhanced isLoading
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-2 only specifies merging isActorFetching into isLoading and returning the full React Query result. Modifying isFetched was not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: useCategoryProductsPaginated calls useStableActor directly to extract isActorFetching separately in addition to calling useStableActorQuery, resulting in two calls to useStableActor and an unrequested isInitialLoading alias
hallucinated_features.reason: The requirement does not specify this double-call pattern or the isInitialLoading alias. useStableActorQuery already merges isActorFetching into isLoading.
